intents.name: Credential Discovery
intents.description: Find exposed credentials, API keys, and secrets

legalNotes: Do not use discovered credentials
Report via responsible disclosure

renders.google: filetype:env (DB_PASSWORD OR API_KEY OR SECRET_KEY OR AWS_SECRET)

legalNotes: Private key exposure is critical
Never use discovered keys

renders.google: "BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY" OR "BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY" OR "BEGIN EC PRIVATE KEY"
renders.bing: "BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY" OR "BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY"

legalNotes: Database access without authorization is illegal

renders.google: filetype:sql "INSERT INTO" (password OR passwd OR user)

legalGuidance.prohibited: Using discovered credentials for any purpose

intents.name: Infrastructure Mapping
intents.description: Map target's digital footprint and technology stack

legalNotes: Passive reconnaissance only

renders.google: site:*.TARGET.com

legalNotes: Passive information gathering

renders.google: site:TARGET.com ("Powered by" OR "Running on" OR Version)

legalNotes: Status pages reveal internal configuration

renders.google: site:TARGET.com (inurl:/server-status OR inurl:/server-info OR intitle:"phpinfo()")

legalNotes: DevOps tools may contain sensitive development data

renders.google: site:TARGET.com (inurl:jenkins OR inurl:gitlab OR inurl:jira OR inurl:confluence)

legalGuidance.permitted: Passive enumeration of publicly indexed content
legalGuidance.prohibited: Active scanning, exploitation of discovered services

legalNotes: GDPR/CCPA may apply to email collection

renders.google: site:TARGET.com "@TARGET.com"

legalNotes: LinkedIn ToS prohibits automated scraping

renders.google: site:linkedin.com/in "TARGET Company"

legalNotes: Executive information for legitimate business intelligence

renders.google: site:linkedin.com/in "TARGET Company" (CEO OR CTO OR CISO OR CFO)

legalNotes: Public commit history is fair game

renders.google: site:github.com "@TARGET.com"

legalGuidance.permitted: Collection of publicly available professional information
legalGuidance.prohibited: Harassment, unauthorized data aggregation, ToS violations
legalGuidance.reportingPath: Document for social engineering awareness training

intents.name: Sensitive Document Discovery
intents.description: Find exposed documents, reports, and files

legalNotes: Marked confidential implies expectation of privacy

renders.google: site:TARGET.com filetype:pdf ("confidential" OR "internal only" OR "not for distribution")

legalNotes: Financial data may be material non-public information

renders.google: site:TARGET.com (filetype:xlsx OR filetype:xls) (budget OR financial OR revenue)

legalNotes: HR documents contain PII subject to privacy laws

renders.google: site:TARGET.com filetype:pdf ("employee handbook" OR "personnel file" OR "performance review")

intents.name: Vulnerability Indicators
intents.description: Find error messages and misconfigurations indicating vulnerabilities

legalNotes: Indicates potential SQL injection - do not exploit

renders.google: site:TARGET.com ("SQL syntax" OR "mysql_fetch" OR "ORA-" OR "PostgreSQL ERROR")

legalNotes: Debug mode exposes application internals

renders.google: site:TARGET.com ("DEBUG = True" OR "stack trace" OR "Traceback (most recent call last)")

legalNotes: Admin panel discovery only - do not attempt login

renders.google: site:TARGET.com (inurl:/admin OR inurl:/wp-admin OR inurl:phpmyadmin) intitle:login

legalGuidance.reportingPath: Document in assessment report; recommend remediation

intents.name: Configuration Exposure
intents.description: Find exposed configuration files and infrastructure details

legalNotes: .env files contain application secrets

renders.google: site:TARGET.com inurl:/.env

legalNotes: Exposed .git allows full source code recovery

renders.google: site:TARGET.com (inurl:/.git/config OR inurl:/.git/HEAD)

legalNotes: Cloud credentials provide infrastructure access

renders.google: site:TARGET.com (inurl:.aws/credentials OR inurl:.kube/config OR filetype:tfstate)

legalGuidance.reportingPath: Immediate responsible disclosure due to critical risk
